disclosure: Optional real Codex review; deterministic score remains independently reproducible.

assessment.summary: Governance evidence is coherent and appropriately bounded: deterministic score 88/100, one HIGH risk flag, and an APPROVED review gate. All approval and PASS claims remain SIMULATED; CI and several external validation gates are NOT_RUN.
strengths: CONTROL_TOWER_REPORT.json consistently reports score 88, one HIGH NO_CI risk, SIMULATED mode, and an APPROVED gate.
The scoped approval and prohibited actions are explicit in .controltower/review-gate.json, including disclosure that reviewer identity was not verified.
docs/EVIDENCE_REPORT.md distinguishes local fixture PASS results from production, provider, security, persistence, deployment, and scale claims.
docs/TRACEABILITY_MATRIX.md links bounded requirements to implementation and verification while marking real integrations NOT_RUN.
docs/NOT_RUN_GATES.md clearly states that NOT_RUN is not PASS and records prerequisites for each skipped gate.

findings.title: No repeatable CI proof
findings.evidence: CONTROL_TOWER_REPORT.json reports NO_CI, identifies .github/workflows/ci.yml as missing, and marks CI FAIL. No CI execution proof is present in the reviewed evidence.
findings.recommendation: Add an approved minimal CI workflow that runs the documented tests in a clean environment and preserve its execution artifact.

findings.title: Approval is simulated and identity is unverified
findings.evidence: .controltower/review-gate.json marks the gate APPROVED but also sets simulated=true and identityVerified=false, explicitly limiting it to a demonstration approval.
findings.recommendation: Do not treat this artifact as verified human authorization for real integrations, credentials, deployment, or production changes.

findings.title: PASS evidence is fixture-scoped and partly referential
findings.evidence: docs/EVIDENCE_REPORT.md records local simulated PASS claims, while CONTROL_TOWER_REPORT.json references a test-output artifact outside the permitted review set; that underlying artifact was not reviewed.
findings.recommendation: Keep PASS labeled SIMULATED and independently verify the referenced test artifact before relying on executable proof beyond this bounded review.

assessment.nextSafeAction: Preserve the current bounded APPROVED scope; add and execute CI only under appropriate approval, while keeping real-provider, identity, browser/accessibility, load/concurrency, deployment, dependency-audit, and independent-security gates explicitly NOT_RUN.
